content:
Uranus in Pisces: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Uranus in Pisces blends the archetypal drive of Uranus (where you seek change, break rules, and awaken) with the Water, mutable nature of Pisces.

  • Planet: Uranus — change, innovation, rebellion, awakening, freedom
  • Sign: Pisces (Water/Mutable) — dreams, compassion, mysticism, surrender, imagination
